tool_args.label: MTA Board Action Items - November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board Meeting - November 19, 2025 Board Action Items package including minutes, procurements, and real estate items.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.
tool_args.raw_text: Purchase of 378 Additional B Division Subway Cars. Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

payload.description: Manufacturer of IVN hardware and software for NYC Transit and MTA Bus Company. Based in Woodbury, New York.
Based in St. Cloud, Minnesota. Furnishes low-floor 40-foot buses.
Based in Burnham, Pennsylvania. Subway car wheel supplier on MTA Qualified Products List.
Supplier of 378 additional B Division subway cars.
New Fare Payment System 'OMNY' contractor. Based in San Diego, California.

tool_args.label: Clever Devices IVN Contract Value
tool_args.raw_text: Total Amount (including options): $40,194,597

payload.description: Five-year noncompetitive miscellaneous service contract to Clever Devices LTD for software maintenance and support services related to the Intelligent Vehicle Network (IVN) system

tool_args.label: New Flyer Option Bus Modification Value
tool_args.raw_text: This Request: $257,602,924

payload.description: Board approval to exercise option for 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses (161 hybrid, 58 clean diesel) from New Flyer of America

tool_args.label: Purchase of 378 B Division Subway Cars
tool_args.raw_text: Purchase of 378 Additional B Division Subway Cars. Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

payload.description: Purchase of 378 additional B Division subway cars from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

tool_args.label: Standard Steel Wheel Contract Value
tool_args.raw_text: Total Amount: $7,350,000 (est.)

payload.description: Estimated quantity contract for 3,000 subway car wheels from Standard Steel LLC

tool_args.label: Cubic CS POS Terminal Modification Value
tool_args.raw_text: This Request: $1,364,510

payload.description: Modification to procure 30 Customer Service Point of Sale (CS POS) Terminals for OMNY

tool_args.label: Subway Ridership Record - 4.56M
tool_args.raw_text: More than 4.56 million people rode the subway last Thursday. It was a new record – the most since COVID.

payload.description: Subway ridership record since COVID
payload.period: Thursday prior to November 19, 2025 board meeting

tool_args.label: Total Transit System Ridership 6.5M
tool_args.raw_text: A total of 6.5 million people all together use the transit system.

payload.description: Total daily ridership across the entire MTA transit system

tool_args.label: Fare Evasion Reduction 30% in One Year
tool_args.raw_text: All of this has succeeded in reducing fare evasion on the subways by 30% in one year.

tool_args.label: MTA Hit Three Billionth Tap
tool_args.raw_text: MTA hit the three billionth tap mark, and almost 90% of folks who ride the transit system are tapping and not using MetroCard.

payload.description: Three billionth OMNY tap milestone

tool_args.label: Almost 90% Tapping
tool_args.raw_text: almost 90% of folks who ride the transit system are tapping and not using MetroCard

payload.description: Percentage of riders using tap and ride (OMNY) instead of MetroCard

tool_args.label: 980 New OMNY Vending Machines Installed
tool_args.raw_text: All the 980 new OMNY vending machines have been installed.

payload.description: New OMNY vending machines installed systemwide

tool_args.label: Crime Down 12% vs Pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: Crime is down this year and it's 12% down versus the year before COVID.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Subway Complex Mega Project Under Budget
tool_args.raw_text: completed the five-year, $700+ million mega project ... The punchline is the project came in $46 million under budget.

payload.description: Grand Central subway complex five-year mega project came in $46 million under budget
payload.raw_value_text: $700+ million mega project ... came in $46 million under budget

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Under Budget and Ahead of Schedule
tool_args.raw_text: the incredibly successful and innovative Park Avenue Viaduct project -- 51 months ahead of schedule, $93 million under budget.

payload.description: Park Avenue Viaduct project came in $93 million under budget and 51 months ahead of schedule

tool_args.label: 15 Customer Service Centers Opening
tool_args.raw_text: In the next few weeks, MTA will be opening another 15 Customer Service Centers, bringing our systemwide total to 30.

payload.description: New Customer Service Centers opening in the next few weeks, bringing systemwide total to 30

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct 51 Months Ahead of Schedule
tool_args.raw_text: 51 months ahead of schedule, $93 million under budget.

payload.description: Park Avenue Viaduct project came in 51 months ahead of schedule

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting November 19, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Board Meeting 2 Broadway 20th Floor Boardroom New York, NY 10004 Wednesday, 11/19/2025 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM ET

payload.description: MTA Board Meeting at 2 Broadway 20th Floor Boardroom New York, NY

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program Commenced
tool_args.raw_text: The CRZ Tolling Program went into effect and tolling commenced on January 5, 2025.

payload.description: Central Business District Tolling Program (CRZ Tolling Program) went into effect and tolling commenced

tool_args.label: Public Transit Cost vs Automobile
tool_args.raw_text: Using public transit is 15% the cost of owning an automobile.

payload.claim_text: Using public transit is 15% the cost of owning an automobile.
payload.subject: public transit cost comparison vs automobile

tool_args.label: Average Subway/Bus Trip Price $1.85
tool_args.raw_text: The average price of a trip on the subway or bus is not three dollars; it is more like $1.85.

payload.claim_text: The average price of a trip on the subway or bus is not three dollars; it is more like $1.85.
payload.subject: average trip price on subway or bus

tool_args.label: 2 Million New Yorkers Get Free or Half Price Fares
tool_args.raw_text: There are already 2 million New Yorkers who are getting free or half price fares on transit.

payload.claim_text: There are already 2 million New Yorkers who are getting free or half price fares on transit.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Service to Albany Starting Spring
tool_args.raw_text: Daily trains are going to start rolling this spring to help out the previously-Amtrak customers who've been dealing with much higher fares and less service since Amtrak took the East River tunnels out of service

payload.description: Daily trains starting this spring to serve the Albany route, filling the gap created by Amtrak East River tunnel rehabilitation

tool_args.label: St. Albans LIRR Station Improvements Celebration
tool_args.raw_text: later this week, the MTA will be celebrating station improvements at St. Albans on the LIRR, a station that has seen a 30% increase in service since we opened Grand Central Madison

payload.description: Celebrating station improvements at St. Albans on the LIRR

tool_args.label: Board Approves Clever Devices IVN Contract
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit proposes to award Noncompetitive Procurements ... Clever Devices LTD $40,194,597

payload.description: Board approved award of $40,194,597 contract to Clever Devices LTD for IVN system support

tool_args.label: Board Approves New Flyer Option Bus Modification
tool_args.raw_text: Approval to exercise Option for 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses ... $257,602,924

payload.description: Board approved $257,602,924 modification to purchase 219 option buses from New Flyer

tool_args.label: Board Approves Kawasaki Subway Car Purchase
tool_args.raw_text: Purchase of 378 Additional B Division Subway Cars. Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

payload.description: Board approved purchase of 378 additional B Division subway cars from Kawasaki Rail Car

tool_args.label: CRZ Tolling Program Funds $15B Capital Projects
tool_args.raw_text: The Traffic Mobility Act requires the CRZ Tolling Program to generate net annual revenues over time to fund $15 billion for MTA's transit and commuter rail system capital projects.

payload.description: CRZ Tolling Program generates net annual revenues to fund $15 billion for MTA transit and commuter rail capital projects

tool_args.label: 30 CS POS Terminals for OMNY
tool_args.raw_text: procure 30 Customer Service Point of Sale ('CS POS') devices to be employed as follows: 24 in front offices, 2 in back offices, and 4 mobile CS POS.

payload.description: 30 Customer Service Point of Sale devices for OMNY: 24 front office, 2 back office, 4 mobile. Supports MetroCard transition.

tool_args.label: 219 Option Buses from New Flyer
tool_args.raw_text: 161 low-floor 40-foot hybrid buses ... 58 low-floor 40-foot clean diesel buses

payload.description: Purchase of 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses: 161 diesel-electric hybrid and 58rid and 58 clean diesel

tool_args.label: ARI Fleet Management Extension
tool_args.raw_text: extend the miscellaneous service contract ... for a period of up to eight months ... and add funding in the amount of $15.7 million

payload.description: Eight-month extension for fleet management services contract with Automotive Rentals Inc. (ARI) for 3,200+ vehicles

tool_args.label: EAM Consulting Retainer Value
tool_args.raw_text: total estimated value of the contracts is $135 million

payload.description: Enterprise Asset Management consulting retainer contract to 17 firms, 7-year term plus three 1-year options

tool_args.label: St. Albans LIRR 30% Service Increase
tool_args.raw_text: a station that has seen a 30% increase in service since we opened Grand Central Madison

payload.description: Service increase at St. Albans LIRR station since opening Grand Central Madison

tool_args.label: Grand Central Subway Complex $700M+ Project
tool_args.raw_text: $700+ million mega project that's upgrading the state of good repair in the entire Grand Central subway complex

payload.description: Five-year mega project upgrading state of good repair in the Grand Central subway complex
